message:
feat(search): Add embedder registry for model selection (bd-2mbe)

Introduce EmbedderRegistry to manage embedder selection and validation
for semantic/hybrid search modes:

- New embedder_registry module with centralized model management
- Validate requested embedder models before use
- Intelligent fallback to best available embedder
- Improved error messages with actionable hints
- Document env vars for output format in help text

This improves the semantic search experience by providing better
model selection and clearer error messages when requested embedders
are unavailable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
